name: Germany
summary: Tuition-free public universities for most programs. Strong English-taught film/media MAs. DAAD scholarships available. Top choice for 0-3L pathway with NOS.
language_notes: Many MA programs in English. Basic German helpful for daily life.

cost_profiles.tuition_notes: €0 tuition at public universities + €100-400/semester admin fee

visa_notes.notes: Blocked account (Sperrkonto) ~€11,208/year required. Admission letter + health insurance needed.
visa_notes.st_candidate_notes: NOS can cover tuition + living. Apply via VFS Kolkata after admission.

scholarship_notes.title: DAAD Scholarships
scholarship_notes.notes: Full/partial funding for Indian students including ST candidates.
scholarship_notes.eligibility: Bachelor's degree, English proficiency, admission to German university

scholarship_notes.title: NOS (India)
scholarship_notes.notes: Ministry of Tribal Affairs covers full cost for ST students at approved foreign universities.
scholarship_notes.eligibility: ST certificate, family income limits, age 18-35

name: France
summary: La Fémis and other prestigious film schools. Campus France process. Moderate tuition at public universities.
language_notes: French B2 often required for national schools. Some English programs at private institutions.

visa_notes.notes: Campus France registration mandatory before visa.
visa_notes.st_candidate_notes: Budget higher than Germany; scholarship critical for NE candidates.

scholarship_notes.title: Eiffel Excellence Scholarship
scholarship_notes.notes: French government scholarship for Master's level.

name: Japan
summary: Tokyo University of the Arts, film schools in Osaka/Kyoto. MEXT scholarship is primary funding route.
language_notes: Japanese N2-N1 for most programs. Some English graduate programs.

visa_notes.notes: COE (Certificate of Eligibility) from school required first.
visa_notes.st_candidate_notes: High cost without MEXT; plan 12+ months ahead.

name: South Korea
summary: KARTS, Chung-Ang University film programs. Growing Hallyu industry connections. KGSP primary scholarship.
language_notes: Korean TOPIK Level 3+ for most programs. English tracks emerging.

visa_notes.notes: Certificate of Admission + bank balance proof.
visa_notes.st_candidate_notes: KGSP covers most costs if selected.

scholarship_notes.title: KGSP (GKS)
scholarship_notes.notes: Korean Government Scholarship Program — tuition + living + flights.

name: United Kingdom
summary: NFTS, LFS, SOAS media programs. High tuition but strong industry links. Chevening primary scholarship.
language_notes: English — no language barrier for Assamese speakers.

visa_notes.st_candidate_notes: Scholarship essential; Chevening or Commonwealth for ST candidates.

scholarship_notes.title: Chevening Scholarship
scholarship_notes.notes: Full funding for one-year Master's at any UK university.
scholarship_notes.eligibility: 2 years work experience, leadership potential, return to India commitment

name: Canada
summary: Concordia Mel Hoppenheim, UBC, York University film programs. PGWP pathway after graduation.

visa_notes.notes: GIC $20,635 + tuition proof. PAL required from 2024.
visa_notes.st_candidate_notes: PGWP offers 1-3 year work permit post-study — strong ROI pathway.

scholarship_notes.title: Vanier Canada Graduate Scholarship
scholarship_notes.notes: Doctoral level but reference for funding landscape.
